results.title: Reaction as housing association acquires land for 280 homes in Cirencester
results.description: PEOPLE in the Cirencester area have reacted to the news that a housing association has secured land for 280 new homes in the town.

results.title: School board approves book fair policy
results.description: The Shenandoah County School Board has approved a new book fair policy, two months after librarians warned an earlier version could make school book fairs too difficult to hold.

results.title: Re: I feel unwelcome on a new ward—what can I do?
results.description: Agreement: I Agree Body: Dear Editor, We write to express concern at the recent Careers Clinic covering what to do 'if you are finding yourself unwelcome on a new ward.' The article made a number of suggestions, ranging from making biscuits for members of the team, to finding a trusted ally for support. The remarks about psychological safety are well made, and there is acknowledgement that the structure and interactions of some teams may be a problem. We know from the Sexism in Medicine survey that misogynistic attitudes persist, that there is widespread reporting of inappropriate behaviour ranging from remarks to sexual assault and that colleagues with disabilities or on LTFT contracts may have more difficulty in 'fitting in'. Multiple differences are likely to compound the challenge. To put forward the view that the emotional load for this should be carried by the junior in a response which could be characterised as being nice/ keeping quiet/ not making waves would, in circumstances like these be not only inappropriate, but harmful to those most vulnerable team members. As an organisation which aims to support women in medicine, we call on the profession and all those working in the wider healthcare landscape to put their own house in order and reform the workplace to make the NHS a fairer, more egalitarian and welcoming organisation for all, able to support everyone as they need and in accordance with the Equalities Act. The time of the model doctor being white, male, full time and able bodied is behind us. More than 50% of the profession is now female and we must engage with this new reality. Kind regards, Sarah Matthews. Vice President, MWF. No competing Interests: Yes The following competing Interests: Electronic Publication Date: Monday, June 15, 2026 - 15:49 AI use: No, I have not used AI Highwire Comment Subject: I feel unwelcome on a new ward—what can I do?
